# useCommandChaining

**Instance Property**

Whether to use command chaining of APDU with a data field longer than 255 bytes.

## Declaration

```swift
var useCommandChaining: Bool { get set }
```

## Discussion

By default, this property is set to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] when the Smart Card ATR announces that command chaining is supported.

## Configuring APDU Behavior

- **cla**: The CLA byte used for APDU transmission. `0x00` by default.
- **useExtendedLength**: Whether to use extended length APDU.
